evals.prompt: Translate the EPUB at test/The_Last_Lantern.epub into a bilingual Chinese/English EPUB. Save the output to test/The_Last_Lantern_bilingual.epub
evals.expected_output: A valid EPUB3 file containing both original English paragraphs and Chinese translations in alternating order, with distinct visual styling for each language.
expectations: The output file test/The_Last_Lantern_bilingual.epub exists and is a valid EPUB (mimetype is application/epub+zip)
The output EPUB contains Chinese characters (translations present)
The output EPUB contains the original English text from the source
Each original paragraph is followed by its Chinese translation in the XHTML
The EPUB has a table of contents navigation
The CSS includes bilingual styling classes (bilingual-orig and bilingual-trans)

evals.prompt: I have an epub file called my-book.epub in my Downloads folder. Can you translate it to Chinese and make a bilingual version? Put the result next to the original.
evals.expected_output: The skill should parse the EPUB, translate paragraphs, and produce a bilingual EPUB alongside the original file.
expectations: The skill parses the EPUB using the parse_epub.py script
The skill translates paragraphs from English to Chinese
The skill builds the bilingual EPUB using build_bilingual_epub.py
The output filename indicates it is a bilingual version
